title: Here's Looking
content:
Here's looking
    at you, dear!
    though I should pour
    A sea of wine,
    my eyes would
    thirst for more.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "Here's Looking", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
